template.name: xvo
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject;

use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Exception\Invalid$NAME$;

/**
 * $NAME$ - $DESCRIPTION$.
 */
final readonly class $NAME$ implements \Stringable, \JsonSerializable
{
    private const int MIN_LENGTH = $MIN$;
    private const int MAX_LENGTH = $MAX$;

    private function __construct(
        private string $value
    ) {}

    public static function create(string $value): self
    {
        $value = trim($value);

        if (mb_strlen($value) < self::MIN_LENGTH) {
            throw Invalid$NAME$::tooShort(self::MIN_LENGTH);
        }

        if (mb_strlen($value) > self::MAX_LENGTH) {
            throw Invalid$NAME$::tooLong(self::MAX_LENGTH);
        }

        return new self($value);
    }

    public function toString(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->value === $other->value;
    }

    public function __toString(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }

    public function jsonSerialize(): string
    {
        return $this->value;
    }
}

variable.name: NAMESPACE
variable.expression: groovyScript("def path = _editor.getVirtualFile().getPath(); def m = path =~ /modules\\/([^/]+)/; m.find() ? m.group(1).capitalize() : 'Module'")

template.name: xid
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject;

use Xmf\Ulid;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Exception\Invalid$ENTITY$Id;

/**
 * $ENTITY$Id - Unique identifier for a $ENTITY$ entity.
 */
final readonly class $ENTITY$Id implements \Stringable, \JsonSerializable
{
    private function __construct(
        private Ulid $ulid
    ) {}

    public static function generate(): self
    {
        return new self(Ulid::generate());
    }

    public static function fromString(string $id): self
    {
        if (!Ulid::isValid($id)) {
            throw Invalid$ENTITY$Id::invalidFormat($id);
        }

        return new self(Ulid::fromString($id));
    }

    public function toString(): string
    {
        return $this->ulid->toString();
    }

    public function getTimestamp(): \DateTimeImmutable
    {
        return $this->ulid->getTimestamp();
    }

    public function equals(self $other): bool
    {
        return $this->ulid->equals($other->ulid);
    }

    public function __toString(): string
    {
        return $this->toString();
    }

    public function jsonSerialize(): string
    {
        return $this->toString();
    }
}

template.name: xstatus
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject;

/**
 * $ENTITY$Status - Lifecycle status of a $ENTITY$.
 */
enum $ENTITY$Status: string
{
    case Draft = 'draft';
    case Published = 'published';
    case Archived = 'archived';

    public function allowedTransitions(): array
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::Draft => [self::Published, self::Archived],
            self::Published => [self::Archived],
            self::Archived => [self::Draft],
        };
    }

    public function canTransitionTo(self $target): bool
    {
        return in_array($target, $this->allowedTransitions(), true);
    }

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::Draft => 'Draft',
            self::Published => 'Published',
            self::Archived => 'Archived',
        };
    }
}

template.name: xentity
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Entity;

use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Id;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Title;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Content;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Status;

/**
 * $ENTITY$ - $DESCRIPTION$.
 */
final class $ENTITY$
{
    private \DateTimeImmutable $updatedAt;

    private function __construct(
        private readonly $ENTITY$Id $id,
        private readonly int $authorId,
        private $ENTITY$Title $title,
        private $ENTITY$Content $content,
        private $ENTITY$Status $status,
        private readonly \DateTimeImmutable $createdAt
    ) {
        $this->updatedAt = $createdAt;
    }

    public static function create(
        int $authorId,
        $ENTITY$Title $title,
        $ENTITY$Content $content
    ): self {
        return new self(
            id: $ENTITY$Id::generate(),
            authorId: $authorId,
            title: $title,
            content: $content,
            status: $ENTITY$Status::Draft,
            createdAt: new \DateTimeImmutable()
        );
    }

    public static function reconstitute(
        $ENTITY$Id $id,
        int $authorId,
        $ENTITY$Title $title,
        $ENTITY$Content $content,
        $ENTITY$Status $status,
        \DateTimeImmutable $createdAt,
        \DateTimeImmutable $updatedAt
    ): self {
        $entity = new self($id, $authorId, $title, $content, $status, $createdAt);
        $entity->updatedAt = $updatedAt;
        return $entity;
    }

    public function getId(): $ENTITY$Id { return $this->id; }
    public function getAuthorId(): int { return $this->authorId; }
    public function getTitle(): $ENTITY$Title { return $this->title; }
    public function getContent(): $ENTITY$Content { return $this->content; }
    public function getStatus(): $ENTITY$Status { return $this->status; }
    public function getCreatedAt(): \DateTimeImmutable { return $this->createdAt; }
    public function getUpdatedAt(): \DateTimeImmutable { return $this->updatedAt; }

    public function updateTitle($ENTITY$Title $newTitle): void
    {
        if (!$this->title->equals($newTitle)) {
            $this->title = $newTitle;
            $this->touch();
        }
    }

    private function touch(): void
    {
        $this->updatedAt = new \DateTimeImmutable();
    }
}

template.name: xrepo
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Repository;

use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Entity\$ENTITY$;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Id;

/**
 * $ENTITY$RepositoryInterface - Persistence contract.
 */
interface $ENTITY$RepositoryInterface
{
    public function findById($ENTITY$Id $id): $ENTITY$;
    public function findByIdOrNull($ENTITY$Id $id): ?$ENTITY$;
    public function findByAuthorId(int $authorId): array;
    public function save($ENTITY$ $entity): void;
    public function delete($ENTITY$ $entity): void;
    public function exists($ENTITY$Id $id): bool;
}

template.name: xrepoimpl
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Infrastructure\Persistence;

use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Entity\$ENTITY$;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Id;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Title;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Content;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Status;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Repository\$ENTITY$RepositoryInterface;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Exception\$ENTITY$NotFound;
use XoopsDatabase;

/**
 * MySql$ENTITY$Repository - MySQL implementation.
 */
final class MySql$ENTITY$Repository implements $ENTITY$RepositoryInterface
{
    private const TABLE = '$TABLE$';

    public function __construct(
        private readonly XoopsDatabase $db
    ) {}

    public function findById($ENTITY$Id $id): $ENTITY$
    {
        $entity = $this->findByIdOrNull($id);

        if ($entity === null) {
            throw $ENTITY$NotFound::withId($id);
        }

        return $entity;
    }

    public function findByIdOrNull($ENTITY$Id $id): ?$ENTITY$
    {
        $sql = sprintf(
            "SELECT * FROM %s WHERE id = %s",
            $this->db->prefix(self::TABLE),
            $this->db->quoteString($id->toString())
        );

        $result = $this->db->query($sql);
        $row = $this->db->fetchArray($result);

        if (!$row) {
            return null;
        }

        return $this->hydrate($row);
    }

    public function findByAuthorId(int $authorId): array
    {
        $sql = sprintf(
            "SELECT * FROM %s WHERE author_id = %d ORDER BY updated_at DESC",
            $this->db->prefix(self::TABLE),
            $authorId
        );

        $result = $this->db->query($sql);
        $entities = [];

        while ($row = $this->db->fetchArray($result)) {
            $entities[] = $this->hydrate($row);
        }

        return $entities;
    }

    public function save($ENTITY$ $entity): void
    {
        if ($this->exists($entity->getId())) {
            $this->update($entity);
        } else {
            $this->insert($entity);
        }
    }

    public function delete($ENTITY$ $entity): void
    {
        $sql = sprintf(
            "DELETE FROM %s WHERE id = %s",
            $this->db->prefix(self::TABLE),
            $this->db->quoteString($entity->getId()->toString())
        );

        $this->db->queryF($sql);
    }

    public function exists($ENTITY$Id $id): bool
    {
        $sql = sprintf(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM %s WHERE id = %s",
            $this->db->prefix(self::TABLE),
            $this->db->quoteString($id->toString())
        );

        $result = $this->db->query($sql);
        [$count] = $this->db->fetchRow($result);

        return (int) $count > 0;
    }

    private function hydrate(array $row): $ENTITY$
    {
        return $ENTITY$::reconstitute(
            id: $ENTITY$Id::fromString($row['id']),
            authorId: (int) $row['author_id'],
            title: $ENTITY$Title::create($row['title']),
            content: $ENTITY$Content::create($row['content']),
            status: $ENTITY$Status::from($row['status']),
            createdAt: new \DateTimeImmutable($row['created_at']),
            updatedAt: new \DateTimeImmutable($row['updated_at'])
        );
    }

    private function insert($ENTITY$ $entity): void
    {
        // Implementation
        $END$
    }

    private function update($ENTITY$ $entity): void
    {
        // Implementation
    }
}

template.name: xexception
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Exception;

/**
 * $NAME$ - $DESCRIPTION$.
 */
final class $NAME$ extends $BASE$
{
    protected function __construct(
        string $message,
        public readonly string $errorCode,
        public readonly array $context = []
    ) {
        parent::__construct($message);
    }

    public static function $FACTORY$($$PARAM$): self
    {
        return new self(
            message: "$MESSAGE$: {$$PARAM$}",
            errorCode: '$ERROR_CODE$',
            context: ['$PARAM$' => $$PARAM$]
        );
    }

    public function toArray(): array
    {
        return [
            'error' => $this->errorCode,
            'message' => $this->message,
            'context' => $this->context,
        ];
    }
}

template.name: xcmd
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Application\Command;

/**
 * $ACTION$$ENTITY$Command - Request to $ACTION_LOWER$ a $ENTITY$.
 */
final readonly class $ACTION$$ENTITY$Command
{
    public function __construct(
        public int $userId,
        public string $$FIELD1$,
        public string $$FIELD2$ = ''
    ) {}
}

template.name: xhandler
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Application\Command;

use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Entity\$ENTITY$;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Title;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Content;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Repository\$ENTITY$RepositoryInterface;

/**
 * $ACTION$$ENTITY$Handler - Executes the $ACTION_LOWER$ use case.
 */
final readonly class $ACTION$$ENTITY$Handler
{
    public function __construct(
        private $ENTITY$RepositoryInterface $repository
    ) {}

    public function handle($ACTION$$ENTITY$Command $command): $ENTITY$
    {
        $title = $ENTITY$Title::create($command->title);
        $content = $ENTITY$Content::create($command->content);

        $entity = $ENTITY$::create(
            authorId: $command->userId,
            title: $title,
            content: $content
        );

        $this->repository->save($entity);

        return $entity;
    }
}

template.name: xquery
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Application\Query;

/**
 * Get$ENTITY$Query - Request to retrieve a $ENTITY$.
 */
final readonly class Get$ENTITY$Query
{
    public function __construct(
        public string $id,
        public int $userId
    ) {}
}

template.name: xqueryhandler
template.value:
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Application\Query;

use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Entity\$ENTITY$;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\ValueObject\$ENTITY$Id;
use $NAMESPACE$\Domain\Repository\$ENTITY$RepositoryInterface;

/**
 * Get$ENTITY$Handler - Retrieves a $ENTITY$.
 */
final readonly class Get$ENTITY$Handler
{
    public function __construct(
        private $ENTITY$RepositoryInterface $repository
    ) {}

    public function handle(Get$ENTITY$Query $query): $ENTITY$
    {
        $id = $ENTITY$Id::fromString($query->id);
        $entity = $this->repository->findById($id);

        if (!$entity->canBeEditedBy($query->userId)) {
            throw new \DomainException('Access denied');
        }

        return $entity;
    }
}

namespace $NAMESPACE$\Tests\Unit\$LAYER$;

#[CoversClass($CLASS$::class)]
final class $CLASS$Test extends TestCase
{

    public function it_$TEST_NAME$(): void
    {
        // Arrange
        $END$

        // Act

        // Assert
    }
}
